gxpci_context_s Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

A gxpci_context_t describes a unidirectional ZC queue. More...


Data Fields

gxio_trio_context_t * trio_context
 TRIO context.
void * mmio_reg_base
 VA of the mapped gxpci_host_regs struct, needed by C2C only.

 Resource that is allocated to this client.

 File handle for driver access.

 MAC number.

unsigned int credits

Detailed Description

A gxpci_context_t describes a unidirectional ZC queue.

Each ZC client instance has one gxpci_context_t.

Examples:

trio/gxpci_c2c/c2c_send.c, trio/gxpci_host_nic/gxpci_echo_drv_module.c, trio/gxpci_host_pq/host.c, and trio/gxpci_mmi/mmi.c.

Field Documentation

gxio_trio_context_t* gxpci_context_s::trio_context

TRIO context.

void* gxpci_context_s::mmio_reg_base

VA of the mapped gxpci_host_regs struct, needed by C2C only.

gxpci_resource_t gxpci_context_s::resource

Resource that is allocated to this client.

Examples:
trio/gxpci_mmi/mmi.c.

int gxpci_context_s::fd

File handle for driver access.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::trio_index

TRIO index.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::mac

MAC number.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::rem_link_index

Remote PCIe port index.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::local_link_index

Local PCIe port index.

gxpci_queue_type_t gxpci_context_s::type

Communication queue type.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::queue_index

Queue index.

Within a PCIe domain, all the queues of the same C2C queue type are indexed. It is the user's responsibility to assign an unique queue index to each pair of applications on the two ends of the PCIe link. The queues of the H2T and T2H queue types are indexed within a single PCIe link.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::completed

The number of commands completed.

The initial value is 0.

unsigned int gxpci_context_s::credits

The number of commands credits.

The initial value is 0.
